reviews.review_description: I really like the first one I love driving fast drifting racing so I was just wondering if you could tell me how much lit 2 would cost

developer_response.body: It will be around 11bucks,  9.99€ etc. The first LIT will remain free.

reviews.review_description: Has a great concept. But its confusing and buggy...
The steering is so ASSI, if i touch the wheel whilst going like under 100 it either glitches or spins me the fvck out.

developer_response.body: If you drive the garage car " KUSTOM " make sure to set the hydraulics to low position, if you´re in the high position it´s like driving on stilts. From other cars Kalis Shinigami is the most stable car, try that if you can grind the money from collecting garage caps, keys and soda. Different cars have different grip so be patient and try few more. There´s also few settings to adjust steering to be more smooth but in this case the issue is the high stance and relatively fast movement plus sharp turns. There´s also indication if your virtual hands are close to the wheel center since it will auto rotate 180 if you cross the center point with your grip, it reads the value of the arc to determine steering. So keep hands further from the center point if possible, grip holds until you release it. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: Tried to load up the game but just got a black screen with music every single time

developer_response.body: Somethings gone wrong in the installation process. Please try again, this usually means it has installed the first part but somehow failed to install the other bigger part and then plays the title music on a black screen. Thanks for you patience.

reviews.review_description: Hello, great game, its poorly made but i love it. Its got good enough crash physics and there is plenty enough cars to choose from, the player avatar is really bad  but it works i guess. Sometimes the game crashes and also you cant buy money, it just breaks the game. Im actually hoping you guys either re -make the game and add WAY more stuff, OR make LIT 2. I think if you made LIT 2 it should be WAYYY more advanced and effort putting version of this game. I like how its multiplayer and the players are nice. Hope you read this and mabey just mabey, do something like this? 🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏

developer_response.body: Hi there, LIT is old and been hard to maintain, with multiple generational updates to the MetaOS. IAP has been fixed now though.   2LIT, the direct open world sequel to LIT is coming in few months or so stay on the lookout. After it´s out LIT will be updated too, it´s not forgotten and will remain the free LIT game.

reviews.review_description: I had experience with being in a discord with these guys, one of the moderators which I will mention, is named Philbert. He and his girlfriend managed to get me banned a long time ago, his girlfriend harassed the living hell out of me, and Philbert prevented me from being able to say anything, and I also "had" evidence, this could be a better review if the developer had chose better staff. Game is alright, would have rated 5 stars if the staff wasn't absolutely useless. (Great experience with the dev, looking forward to a talk with the team.)
When I tried to play this game a few months ago it was so laggy and it kept crashing in the main menu screen please fix it if you haven't already, thank you it looks like a good game.

developer_response.body: It was updated a month ago, so please try to install again. If there´s still some unique problem reports back here. Thanks!
It´s coming out 26th May. Teaser called " Realitys´s Broke" 2LIT   ,can be found on Youtube. Thanks for your patience.

reviews.review_title: Really good game from my memory
reviews.review_description: This game has some sick cars and all of that. I don't remember much cause I haven't played for like a year but I am going to play again soon since I started to think about this game

developer_response.body: If you want to try it out it´s now updated to work better on Quest2 too.

reviews.review_description: So basically some guy told me her had a cat in the passenger seat can you actually do that? Or is it just me ￼￼

developer_response.body: Yes, get Reaper-car and press on the car name plate letter "P" with the tip of your finger,  you will see a cat icon appear in the middle of the letter, it´s small but once you change it you will have garage cat with you on the passanger seat. Enjoy your ride!

reviews.review_title: how to make money. and play the game
reviews.review_description: so the games amazing. but something slot of new players struggling with is that they don't know how to make money. 1: pick up the keys and soda drink off the desk behind you when you spawn in. 2: go to the glowing thing on your mini map in old town and do that lap. 3: go beat the campaign by buying cars and get 500k at the end. 4: go fo all the stunts to get an amount of cash i do not know. 5: beat all the races. 6: do the ? icon on the map when you spawn in the public lobby. there should be behind you if you go and zoom out you should  see a ? on your mini map, go to it and take out one of the red dots on the mini map. 1: how to buy cars. go to the car you want on the screen in front of you and click on it. then at the bottom right there should be a price. click it and then set the area of where you want your car. 1: upgrade your ride. to do that you want to go to the left front bumper of your car and turn the first 2 to Grey then the last one to Grey. this makes your car faster. 1: how to make edits to your car. go to the paint on the front right bumper and click either the top or the bottom. with the plus car section, you can make the car either drift or race. and the old BMW a manule or a automatic. and for the other cars the top one makes it look different its all free just the car is not free. well that's a how to play the game I loved the game thank you also why is there a turbo sound in the f1 car. f1 cars are naturally aspirated vehicles l. and quite frankly I do not think this is realistic. other then that great game please fix the drifting l. and where do I find lit 2 or 2lit

developer_response.body: Thanks for explainer review, currently 2LIT is being rushed together and this time it actually start with a tutorial so it won´t fall into same trouble that LIT has.  You can get and invite to older LIT2 preview version if you send your Meta linked email to: support@refinereality.com to receive invite. Discord link can be found via SideQuest-page, I will update it since it could be outdated again. Thanks again.

reviews.review_description: Game is enjoyable however, the game won’t let me on Monday, so I cannot progress further so stuck with the base car. I don’t wanna pay for micro transactions

developer_response.body: Use the dial unit to change the room code, usually rooms like 1111 and 1122 get full. Thanks for the review, microtransactions are down until whole game reworked after 2LIT is in the clear.

reviews.review_description: Can't turn left when i try the car flips

developer_response.body: Drive slower , turn less and lower your KUSTOM-car for better handling, also you can adjust some settings in the garage.

reviews.review_description: I said hi n got banned

developer_response.body: My apologies for that, feel free to join anytime and let me know if there´s any issues at all. Mods should follow the guidelines underlined in common rules to make gameplay fun for all. Thanks for the info.

reviews.review_description:
one star 
because my character keeps getting tall and i can't get in the car

developer_response.body: use the the controller button to "crouch" then you can get into even the lowest car doors. Remember to recenter your player too, especially once you get in the driving part, that way you can adjust your seat. Good luck :D

reviews.review_description: I love this game but I can’t buy any in game money or anything and it’s realy anoying

developer_response.body: Yeah it is broken due to new SDK requirements/architecture and unfortunately updating is not possible due to game being a bit old, so until it´s properly fixed/redone only optionfor players is to follow the story and grind money ingame. Truly sorry about the situation, this far attempts to redo multiple systems at once have failed miserably.

reviews.review_description: Once I first saw it I was like: this looks crappy, but then I tried it and it better than any payed game I have lol it's really realistic crash physics and racing? Hell yeah!🔥

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive feedback and enjoy moments flying throught the air and crashing hard :D Remember to blink if it gets too real.

reviews.review_description: is it just me or are the cars slippery, tracking for steering sucks so much, most of the time it just locks my position, and the steering is way to sensitive and just in general a headache to drive in this game if there’s any way to fix this lmk but if not then this game sucks

developer_response.body: In garage there´s a "paper" that you can touch to change steering curve, it has 3 option, those will smooth out handling according to their descriptions. In full speed turns cars veer off naturally, so remember to add some brake, speed can be deceiving. Some cars also have better qualities so with for example the Kalis car Shikigami has 4Wheel drive and has really good handling. Also it´s possible to set steering angle and brakes in the cars leftside menu (walk to left front of the car while facing it. Enjoy (or not) LIT!

reviews.review_description: this game is amazing but an the turning on the steering wheel be a bit more realistic still amazing
i bought money and i never got it i want the money or my money back

developer_response.body: Please contact support to resolve the issue. Current system should refund you automatically, but if not, contact: support@refinereality.com and with a receipt of the purchase things can be solved. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: If y'all really wanna make money add a Toyota AE86 (do it and my life is yours) please please please PLEASE REFINE LABS PLEASE 🙏🙏

developer_response.body: Check out current car "Michin Shogun", but yeah I hear you the new real life version is looking to be the coolest car in a while in that category. Stay tuned for 2LIT ... I think I have a legit model in store so It might be possible to bring it to 2LIT later, maybe even LIT1. We´ll see...

reviews.review_description: Will there be any new updates coming to lit like more car customizations and more areas to explore?

developer_response.body: Currently trying fix underlying issues of recent OS updates. Hopefully after that there´s time to do update too. Try BoulderDGEN it´s fairly similar ride in LIT.

reviews.review_description: So this game looks SUPER fun but it just won't let me join

developer_response.body: Room might be full so go to the dial on the office room and change the room code to a random room or the preset ones. Usually room 1111 and 1122 are quite full. Report back if there´s other issues. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: No head traking i made my crouch up and down randomly and made me brake 2 holes in my walls and smash my door into pieces

developer_response.body: Game has head tracking, maybe space was too small and it was deactivated by MetaOS.

reviews.review_description: Trash ahh game can’t even steer properly game is just good at all everything about it is ahh learn how to make a game bro I swear

developer_response.body: Steering is done grabbing the steering wheel. If you let go it won´t auto steer or steer with sticks. In the garage table you can customize steering mode to be more direct or more smoothed out. Steering isn´t realistic 540degree rotation. Thanks for trying LIT!

Create a open worldmap.

developer_response.body: Ok, if that´s is a problem inside the car, you can disable the body. Although you can´t hide it in garage.

Absolutely superb! For a free game it’s got amazing content, great little story line and brilliant cars to obtain! 

Really great well monitored community also with in game moderators to deal with any issues in game. 

Brilliant street racing vibes

developer_response.body: Thanks, LIT is open for everyone to join the fun :D

reviews.review_description: It sucks ngl

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying anyway.

reviews.review_description: This game ducks at the start a was happy but every time im always so tall i cant reach the door handle if i sit down im so tall same with i stand up i hate this game

developer_response.body: Did you get it working? It´s more or less a seated game, in the garage there´s a button to make you crouch, look it up, then you´ll be able to crouch low. Make sure to recenter by pressing Meta button long. Hope you get to the driving part. Check out the controls anyway since there´s a lot of controls on the driving side too, like resetting after getting stuck on a tree etc.  Enjoy LIT, if you can!

reviews.review_description: Great driving game! respectful community too!

developer_response.body: Thanks, that is great to hear :D

reviews.review_description: This game is poorly made but on purpose i think

developer_response.body: Can you be more specific? It will help once LIT is updated next time. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description:
Looks like a great game but all i get is i need
 audio permission the.a black screen and some flashing light like i a bunch of flashes of a
 gerage around me and a black screen

developer_response.body: First try selecting another room code, not sure why it let in the room while it was full (it should not). Please also reinstall and make sure to approve the mic permission, if you decline it will jitter like no tomorrow. The plate in the beginning used to show that you need to approve it but after meta updates it vanishes too fast now and that information is not shown. So reinstall and/or go to settings and approve microphone input. Note that it´s muted by default ingame (3 options to listen or speak) and also possible to mute it from Meta settings menu. Thanks for letting me know and playing LIT!

developer_response.body: No, but it´s reasonably priced (and will join all possible sale events to get exposure) , Lit2 will include system to redeem some of the vehicles from LIT1, probably in few tiers with a onetime transaction. For more questions search Sidequest page of LIT for link to discord. Enjoy LIT!

reviews.review_description: 100 percent the best cars and the city is cool. Can’t wait for lit 2

reviews.review_description: My stuff got hacked

reviews.review_title: How to get to the race through the inter
reviews.review_description: I play this game a lot, it's very atmospheric and good. But I can't figure out how to start a race on the map, I drive to the marker, a circle appears around me with the name and all that. How do I figure out where to go?How to confirm the race and how to understand where its end is and all that help .

developer_response.body: Good that you brought it up. Idea is to remember the places around the city, then when you start a race is randomly gives every participant the destination (with spinning fx making it equal for everyone to start heading to the right direction)  then you race as fast as you can to the destination where you will see a checkered flag. Keep in mind that crowded servers can have all races "jammed" so pick a random room and try it there with friends or with the "offline" Rivals-option that you an activate in the garage too, then it sets a off-number random room that is likely totally private. Thanks for playing and asking!

reviews.review_description: i was just playing and then it said activated real life mode and it started showing my house and i don't know if that's scan my room but that's just not okay after all it's not a bad game

developer_response.body: Don´t worry, it´s just the passthough mode. It´s there if you want to take reallife images with the car on your yard etc. Check the controls sheet in the garage so you don´t accidentally trigger it next time, I frankly forgot what button it´s under :D

reviews.review_description: When I try and go and purchase something, my screen gets stuck and brings me to the store, but with no options to buy anything

developer_response.body: First make sure you are not using sideloaded version, since it does not have option for purchases. Other than that it might be a server issue on Meta side so try again later. Thanks again. Also make sure your headset is up to date with system updates.

reviews.review_description: When I started the game this guy had like blue print and he told me to do a mission, but I don’t know how to do it ￼

developer_response.body: Sorry for the confusion. Car menu screen shows a pink tool icon on the bottom corner which car Mike needs to continue the rebuild. Start first by getting Michin Shogun and then look at the screen or listen to Mike which car he needs to continue. I know it´s a bit confusing. The brochure he had was just an image of the Michin Shogun, not a blueprint in that sense. Thanks for asking, I´m here to help. Find the discord link from LIT Sidequest page to join the community for direct answers.

reviews.review_description: Ive played a few missions bought a few cars raced a few people online, i think i like this game more everytime i play it !! The car graphics are great ! I am really starting to enjoy this game, the easy mods the maps are decent the game is LIT its honestly better then a few other games, buying the f1 race car, hitting the brakes and seeing them get red hot and smoking...wow! Cant wait to see the updates ! Great game so far ! So many cars to choose from all realistic really feels like your in the game !

developer_response.body: Thanks, LIT is result of several years of updates and improvements, I´m glad you find the content good and found all the ways to tweak your ride, it´s all around the garage and car so things can go unnoticed. Check out the bodymods for certain cars like both Salvaggio´s and the Elcat (just touch the car name where you change colors so it changes the bodykit for these certain cars).

reviews.review_description: It’s taking so long to load in

developer_response.body: LIT loads the city in one go and after that can jump between BayreCity, Racetrack and Mountain road without extra loading. Loading is as short as it can be things still need to be loaded into memory before game can begin and have content. If it was just a plain field then it would load faster, but it´s a complex city with long roads.

reviews.review_description:
It is soo fun and its free to mention for 1mil its
 7$, but all in all its the best vr driver out there

developer_response.body: Thanks, glad you like it. Correct, it´s a free game but if you don´t want to grind through all the things like story, missions, race etc. you can get cars with IAPs.

reviews.review_title: Pretty good game, one suggestion though
reviews.review_description: First off all, these is my favorite game to just drive around listening to music. I haven’t tried the story yet, but from what I hear, it’s pretty good. One suggestion: I think there should be an option to change the time of day. I would personally do this by adding motels or something like that in every map, and you can chose to sleep until (blank) time of day. Other than that, great game keep it up!

developer_response.body: Thanks for getting the idea of LIT, it indeed is a game to chillax. Currently working with LIT2 that has everything you can dream of and more + more. Join discord from Sidequest page (follow socials..) link and get involved in testing LIT2 and the city of Widewater.

reviews.review_title: How do i make the car manual?
reviews.review_description: How do i make the car manual?

developer_response.body: In LIT1 unfortunately only one car called "BLADE Motorsport" has this option. It was not that functional so it was not scaled to other cars. LIT2 on the other hand will have at least manual up-down shifting while "H" type shifting is planned too but not yet tested. Thanks for asking!

reviews.review_title: Needs a Tutorial and Simpler Menus
reviews.review_description:
This game cares more about flashy menus than racing

Edit: I never even started the race. I wasted 30 minutes trapped in the endless menus before I rage quit and deleted the app.

Edit: If you say so, but I’m not the only one who couldn’t make it work. Like I said it needs better tutorials and simpler menus, why all the fluff?

developer_response.body: What menus do you mean? You can enter the city by grabbing a drivers side handle of the garage car (KUSTOM)? You can literally try to enter room 555-1111 or pick random room and grab the handle of the KUSTOM car then go driving as soon as you spawn int garage. Believe me I´ve tried to keep as little as possible menus but after requests some vehicle tuning menus have been added as well as the tutorial windows. Most selections are embedded in the environment and not so much in use daily, so my advice is to not bother about the selections, pick room and a car and enter the city. The dial system is there so you can change the room into a random one to drive around with friends. Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: How couldn’t I write a review with a such amazing driving game and I saw a complaint and you responded with something like the quest2 make it hard to play but I play it smoothly no problems but I do have a question what is the most realistic steering wheel mode

developer_response.body: I personally like the default smoothed mode, but it depends which kind of car setup you need softer is more like a daily driver and linear is like over the top racing setup. It think there could be more modes in lit2 since it creates a dirrefent feel definetely, if you want that super lossy cheap car feel for example.

reviews.review_title: This came should be more popular
reviews.review_description: This is a completely underated game with a decent amount of cars and good customization for cars and your player and gloves. There is a decent story and a medium size open world map

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, truth is that LIT has only spread through organic growth that´s why it´s not in the spotlight. Like I like to phrase it: "Talk is cheap". So I trust people to trust other people to when they tell em give LIT a try. It´s free so it also helps.

reviews.review_description:
This game is one of many that I LOVE to play.
Personally, I love cars and there’s not many car games on the Meta Quest 2 (that are free) but I do hope to see that there might be daytime and updated car interiors with more interactive items inside?


The storyline is just absolutely amazing, it represents that you can accomplish anything if you stick to the plan. - The way you buy different cars to repair the Kroitzer is insane. 

I would also like to add a little bit on the Fury Horizon Hills100 race..
I’d like to see the race events having more people on. Very rarely I’d see anyone there and I’d have to tell my friends about the game so we can race together.

Before I finish up my yapping, I would also like to request that in the game or even in LIT(2) that there might be a car that resembles the MK4 Toyota Supra? 
We already have the MK5 Supra but I think I would be so sick if there was the MK4 to satisfy the drifting and cruising fantasies of Japan.



Overall, this game is just absolutely amazing!
The cars are so realistic, they look exactly the real way inside, the names are quite unique and creative too haha.

P.S:
R.I.P Roy

developer_response.body: Thanks, story is unfortunately fairly simple, hope that changes totally in LIT2 :D.  For the KalisGX I think only adding a custom body would be possible to LIT1 later on, but now I focus currently on LIT2 which has in my test versions power windows, opening doors, blinkers and working naviscreen, engine bay opening and friend sitting next to you, plus obviously you can roam freely in the city, even take a citybike and ride it if your car is toast :D.

reviews.review_description: I can’t find the LIt discord anywhere I believe you had a link in the office but it’s gone I can’t find it in the disbord Or regular server lists.. someone sent me the link but it takes me straight to my own server.. can you pls help? 🙏

developer_response.body: Go to Sidequest page for LIT, just search LIT on Sidequest web page and it will be the first result. There you will see a text under the description sayin " follow them on socials"  it´s a link for the discord so press that. Let me know if it does not work. Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: I personally love the game it is one of my favourites right now but I’m still not sure on how to make money in this game

developer_response.body: Ok let´s go through it again. First of is the story mode that requires some car purchases , so to get started the easiest way to pick up change is the garage: Soda, KalisCaps and keys give some money each time you load garage.  In Bayre City there´s plenty of options to start serious earning that is by completing and winning street races. You can start them from those whirly symbols on map, just stay still near the center and listen/watch where to race to, to make winning easy try "RIVALS-mode" that pick you a random room with no multiplayer opponents, just goofy Rival cars. Bayre City Racetrack has the option to start a one lap race just by parking to the grid, search the racetrack entry from the map or ask someone online. Then there´s special missions like "Delivery-mission" that is only in Rivals-mode and then also "Where´s Mike?-mission" where you hunt down Mike and if you find him you get the amount left. In the mountain you can complete "MountainRun" upward of dowward and each time you make new personal record you get bonus too. Then there´s HorizonHills Racetrack that has good price for the long race but requires 2 players min. and Fury in your garage. That´s about it, completing story, stunts or all races gives you a reward also. Have fun!

reviews.review_description: could you please optimize the game or make it more playable on the oculus quest 2?

developer_response.body: Believe it or not this game was developed for Quest2 back in the day, during the last ½year every possible optimization has been made to ensure better functionality with Quest2, the issue is with Meta Horizon OS (operation system) that is getting bulkier and somehow using more RAM or some resources that make running LIT on Quest2 sketchy. After latest update 1.3 there´s not much to add to LIT , so next steps are to use time to optimize more if it´s somehow possible. Thanks for playing LIT.

reviews.review_title: wheel too sensitive tutorial is too hard
reviews.review_description: i thought It was going to be a good car game but it was horrible because the wheel was to sensitive and    the guy you go against smoke's you:(

developer_response.body: It´s the scripted intro :D You can adjust wheel steering curve in garage table, there you can set 2 smoothing types or leave it as is linear, try it and I hope it helps to smoothen your ride.

reviews.review_description: This game has SO much potential. At first I hated it because it’s janky sometimes but when you’re just sitting back cruising around… it’s actually kinda fun..

developer_response.body: LIT is a bit dated game already, first tests were made for OculusGO back in 2017, it took few more years for LIT to get it to Sidequest and finally to Meta Horizon. Next part will be out later this year :D it´s been developed paraller with LIT updates.

reviews.review_title: Every time I turn on mixed reality
reviews.review_description: It won’t turn off and it makes me mad

developer_response.body: Thanks for the info, it should turn OFF like it turns ON but need to check it´s ok for next fix update.

reviews.review_description: It's super fun even funner when you crash multiple cars you can buy the developer did really good on this game and if I could rate it higher then five I would rate one hundred.

developer_response.body: Thanks, it´s been a long time buildup to make it as good as it is now.

reviews.review_title: You have to give it a fair chance.
reviews.review_description: I intially found the game boring and slow but after the intial grind, you start to see some charecter in the game. Especially for a free driver game, this one scratches the itch. It definitely has some bugs and could use some tlc, but with that said I can definitely see future potential for this game if the devs play their cards right and understand their target audience. Im rooting for this one. It gave me a very nostalgic "Need For Speed" experience and ill be keeping my eye on this one sink or swim.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your hopeful remarks. Sudden performance drops have been an issue for Quest2 and halting develpoment lately but it´s hopefully going to be solved in few weeks after a successful game-engine update. If stars are aligned LIT can remain getting more modded car variants and maybe even other improvements before LIT2 is relevant. Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_description: Won't load on my quest 3

developer_response.body: Please try loading again installing again and make sure to have 3gb or free space. Sometimes only first part gets installed and then it won´t work properly. Thanks for reaching out!

reviews.review_description: Awesome game, but how do you turn on the police sirens?!

developer_response.body: You need to dial the center console where there´s a wave looking icon with a red light, it marks the wave-type audio that the siren is. Point there with your finger until you find it. Thanks for playing LIT!

reviews.review_description: I love  it

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing LIT, stay tuned for some more updates in the future.

reviews.review_title: I didn’t play the game yet
reviews.review_description: I hope it’s good

developer_response.body: Some hate it.. but some love it :D

reviews.review_description: Add custom wheels and custom color and music and bass for the cutless

developer_response.body: RIMS ADDED IN UPDATE v1.3, it has added each individual rim to be modied : LIT now has option to select different rims for all cars (except ThornRacingTeam), rims can be selected individually by touching each tyre. |   Have you tried to change some cars to mod state, they have some alteration to the look, no all but some. There´s 7 colors to choose from, and cars like fury have custom skins for the Fury:Rampage mod. There´s option to set up custom internet radio stations (host your own) and they play it ingame. I think you can have decent volume level from Quests so find a booming inet radio station. Thanks for playing LIT and cheer up :D

reviews.review_description: Gets stuck on the loading screen and plays music. That's it. Software is up to date.

developer_response.body: Update: LIT version is being worked on to support more modern game-engine and hopefully leave these kind of issues behind in February.   Have you been ablet to install succesfully? Try removing the installation and reinstalling. Make sure to apprive mic permission too when starting the game. The installation can be corrupt and then it usually only the first part of the package is installed thus the empty screen after title. Make sure to have enough space to install too ca. 3GB of space.

reviews.review_description: It kept making my player go away from his body now my quest 2 is broken if you wanna keep your oculus do not buy

developer_response.body: Game is free but there has been issues with Quest2 after OperationSystem updates during last few months, even optimizing everything hasn´t helped, keep in mind this game has literally been tested and developed with Quest2 originally and since this fall it has been running out of RAM constantly. Thanks for your consern. Press power button long to restart your headset if it freezes.

reviews.review_description:
It's so bad. The graphics are alright, and so is the multiplayer. BUT the story. Heck no. The part where your gf calls and says stuff like "I js heard a story that the porsche is blah blah blah come pick me up in it" is the most unplayable, unbearable, part ever. I still haven't completed it since. The car that you have to drive (the pink RWB) literally overseers every turn. It's hard NOT to crash. 

...



I uninstalled this. Thank you, "refine-reality" like you're gonna refine the chassis for me.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the Razzy nomination :D The story is a way to earn ingame money in a pretty easy way after all, it´s not mandatory and frankly it´s a bit glued-on and tacky. Anyway, cars have different features and Kreuzer is pretty harsh and unforgiving. Haven´t really altered it much unlike other cars but it also has the edit settings menu once you own it after winning the final race, but it still might not make it the dreamcar. Stay tuned for LIT2 later on with completely different physics.

reviews.review_description: Did not let me inside my car

developer_response.body: Have you tried again? Try again later or try changing the room code (funny machine in the office room) to a random number or pick one your self and you can pick one from the wall images (just not that 555-1111 since it´s the default room always full of players). Thanks for letting me know, there´s going to be improvements on this side of things now that there´s starting to be a lot of player online at peak times. I hope you have time to try again sometime later.

reviews.review_description: Some times it is buggy but over all great

developer_response.body: Thanks. Some bugs feel like built in by now. Disappearing hands is one and blackscreen on collision another. Those have been tracked for a while without success.

reviews.review_description: It is a really fun game the only problem I have is that I have no idea how to earn money in the game, if any one can tell me how.

developer_response.body: There´s many ways: Start races around the city and complete/win them, Do stunt jumps doing them all earns you a reward too, go through story mode earns you bonus, doing one lap races and winning them at the BayreCity Racetrack earns you 20k. In the garage you can collect(grab) Kalis-caps, soda and keys every time you log in or return to earn some small change. Then you can drive Deliveries in Rivals mode, that requires more skills though. Then there´s HorizonHills racetrack where you can compete and win too but it requires Fury-car to try it. Also completing MountainRun challenge earns you money each run uphill or downhill.  New game mode to catch a NPC car is coming in next update so that´ll be one more way to earn.

reviews.review_description: What do you do after the Porsche blows up from the drag race I’m stuck I have no leads for anything I cant grab the brochure from his hands or nothing.

developer_response.body: You just need to take a look at the brochure (it was added later to clarify) that you need to acquire the car: MichinShogun for Mike to continue the repair process and story. (Where´s Mike minigame has nothing to do with the story by the way :D ) . Update this review if you need further assistance.

reviews.review_description: Stuck on loading screen

developer_response.body: Notice that Quest1 is not supported. On Quest2/3/Pro The issue is either corrupted installation or not applying microphone input permission. 1.Remove and reinstall the LIT app.   2. After successful installation and starting the app give permission for voice/microphone at the start and save the setting too. (if you save the opposite it might be stuck for good unless you go to settings menu and give the permission) Good luck and I hope you get in to enjoy LIT. Remember that LIT requires internet connection for each game session, since it´s native multiplayer.

reviews.review_description: How do I do the story

developer_response.body: OK, first of you enter the Pink Kreuzer at the garage and get to the Dragway with Roy. After you´ve done that you need to listen to what Mike is after. First he needs the MichinShogun car to proceed then another car. Listen to Mike, he will pop up everytime you load the garage. Listen carefully and ask more questions if needed. Have fun!

reviews.review_description: Crashed all the time and only a black screen

developer_response.body: Notice that Quest1 is not supported.  Try remove/reinstall and remember to ALLOW voice/audio in the beginning to proceed, game will NOT work without it. If you are able to get to the garage make sure to change room code if default room (555-1111) is full. If you need assistance search for LIT SideQuest page for socials aka Discord link.

reviews.review_description: Please make a sandbox made also can you make it where you can make it day I really want to drive of of mountains for fun have you seen the car pc games I want a map like that and also can you make a crash more realistic if you can 5/5 stars tho

developer_response.body: Thanks for posting the review and stop by at LIT discord for any ideas you have (link in Sidequest). At the moment LIT(1) is a bit limited in RAM memory etc but LIT(2) will have more of everything (again) . At the moment you CAN go to mountains and jump off, there´s even a hidden ramp there to cash a stunt :D . Daytime option is currently only in HorizonHills track where you can also use the ramps etc to make a stunt track of your own. Access Horizon Hills Speedway by EDITOR TABLE at garage(point nuts and bolts to open menu). Good luck driving the oval track!

reviews.review_description:
Amazing game, have so much fun everytime I turn it on. Would love to see some daytime maps though, so we can see some more of the interiors of our cars because rn a lot of the cars are very dark and can’t see much if the interior. Other than that this is a great game esspecially for being free. 
Highly recommend anyone who likes driving games to give this one a try.

developer_response.body: Hi there, LIT is designed to represent nighttime cruising and there´s only 1 real light, your headlights (others lights are dummy lights) so there´s not that much interplay with light and shadows due to device limitations (Quest2). The coolest visuals are near the player so gotta say that there´s not that much to see in the interiors ( boosting adds some extra glow :D ). Stay tuned for LIT(2) once it hits public tests so you can have your say on things like day/night cycle. Thanks for playing LIT!

reviews.review_description: I would love to see a dodge charger scatpack widebody, or atleast a charger and a daytime mode would be cool to. But for now keep the work up my guy nice game love it.

developer_response.body: Latest update 1.191 brought Reaper:Shadow bodymod! Join LIT discord to discuss more with likeminded people. Thanks for burning the night away in LIT!

reviews.review_title: Good game with a lot of potential
reviews.review_description: This game has so much potential I’m looking forward to see how the game turns out in the future, must try game considering it’s free and online

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support!

reviews.review_description: It’s a really good game I just don’t know how to get lots of money

developer_response.body: Don´t worry there´s several ways to start earning. Easiest is to race in random room against NO rivals...don´t hesitate to do it to familiarize the city that way. Then you can do it against AI-Rivals which is bit more fun :D Also doing stunts earns you cash. Completing the story (which requires gathering money from races) earns you a nice reward at the end. As bonus you can fetch the KALIS-caps each time you arrive to garage to earn instant bonus cash, just like the keys and the soda on the table. Delivery missions in Rivals-mode can make you as much as max 50k a run. Visit Bayre Racetrack to start a race from the grid to earn 20k if you win the lap. Good luck in the races and check back every now and then if there´s additional perks like the xmas gift that you should grab ASAP :D

reviews.review_description: Great game, just think it could give a few pointers towards some of the quests such as mission shogun and such

developer_response.body: Yeah, a notepad with a list of things to do next could help alot. I´ll try to come up with a clear and lightweight way of explaining many things.Thanks for pointing this out.
